h4:not(.not-prose):first-child]:mt-0"><p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words"=
># Tarea de Automatizaci=C3=B3n con GPOs</p>
<hr>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Parte 1: Mapeo autom=C3=A1tico de =
unidades de red:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;"><span>**Objetivo:**</span> Configurar la asignaci=C3=
=B3n autom=C3=A1tica de recursos de red mediante GPO seg=C3=BAn el grupo de=
 seguridad del usuario.</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Configuraci=C3=B3n de Permisos</p=
>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">Para garantizar la seguridad, se han configurado permi=
sos NTFS y de red eliminando el grupo "Todos" en las carpetas departamental=
es.</p>
<table><thead><tr><th style=3D"text-align: left;">Recurso Compartido</th><t=
h style=3D"text-align: left;">Ruta Local</th><th style=3D"text-align: left;=
">Acceso Autorizado</th><th style=3D"text-align: left;">Justificaci=C3=B3n<=
/th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style=3D"text-align: left;"><span>**Compart=
ida-Admin**</span></td><td style=3D"text-align: left;"><span class=3D"text-=
sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-oran=
ge-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Compartidas\Admin</span></td><td style=
=3D"text-align: left;"><span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg=
-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">=
GRP_Administracion</span></td><td style=3D"text-align: left;">Restringido s=
olo a personal de administraci=C3=B3n.</td></tr><tr><td style=3D"text-align=
: left;"><span>**Compartida-Info**</span></td><td style=3D"text-align: left=
;"><span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-=
orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Compartidas\Infor=
matica</span></td><td style=3D"text-align: left;"><span class=3D"text-sm px=
-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-30=
0/10 dark:text-orange-300">GRP_Informatica</span></td><td style=3D"text-ali=
gn: left;">Restringido solo a personal de inform=C3=A1tica.</td></tr><tr><t=
d style=3D"text-align: left;"><span>**Compartida-Todos**</span></td><td sty=
le=3D"text-align: left;"><span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono =
bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300=
">C:\Compartidas\Comun</span></td><td style=3D"text-align: left;"><span cla=
ss=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 d=
ark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Todos los usuarios</span></td><t=
d style=3D"text-align: left;">Recurso com=C3=BAn para intercambio de archiv=
os.</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Implementaci=C3=B3n de la GPO</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Nombre:**</span><span class=3D"t=
ext-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-=
orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mapeo-Unidades-YGM</span>.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Ubicaci=C3=B3n:**</span> Configu=
raci=C3=B3n de usuario &gt; Preferencias &gt; Asignaciones de unidad.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Segmentaci=C3=B3n:**</span> Se u=
tiliza para que cada grupo vea solo su unidad correspondiente (Z: o Y:), ad=
em=C3=A1s de la unidad com=C3=BAn (X:).</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Vinculaci=C3=B3n:**</span> La GP=
O est=C3=A1 vinculada a <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono b=
g-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300"=
>UO_Administracion</span>, <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mon=
o bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-3=
00">UO_Informatica</span> y <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mo=
no bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-=
300">UO_Usuarios</span>.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words"># Tarea 1: Mapeo Autom=C3=A1tico de U=
nidades de Red</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Estructura de UOs:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Se ha configurado la jerarqu=C3=AD=
a de <span>**Unidades Organizativas**</span> en el <span>**Active Directory=
**</span> para organizar a los usuarios y equipos seg=C3=BAn su funci=C3=B3=
n.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"uo" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/uo.png" &gt;&lt;/image-car=
d&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Carpetas a compartir:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Se han creado las carpetas locales=
 en el servidor dentro de la ruta <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !f=
ont-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-o=
range-300">C:\Compartidas\</span>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"carpetas" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/compartidas.png" &gt=
;&lt;/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Compartici=C3=B3n de carpetas:</p=
>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">#### Carpeta Admin:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">Configuraci=C3=B3n de los <span>**permisos de recurso =
compartido**</span> y <span>**permisos NTFS**</span> para el grupo <span>**=
GRP_Administracion**</span>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/c-admin.png" &gt;&lt=
;/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/ntfs-admin.png" &gt;=
&lt;/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">#### Carpeta Informatica:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">Configuraci=C3=B3n de los <span>**permisos de recurso =
compartido**</span> y <span>**permisos NTFS**</span> para el grupo <span>**=
GRP_Informatica**</span>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/c-info.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/ntfs-info.png" &gt;&=
lt;/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">#### Carpeta Comun:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Configuraci=C3=B3n de los <span>**=
permisos de recurso compartido**</span> y <span>**permisos NTFS**</span> pa=
ra el grupo <span>**Todos los usuarios**</span>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/c-comun.png" &gt;&lt=
;/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"permisos" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/ntfs-comun.png" &gt;=
&lt;/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Crear GPO:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Se ha procedido a la creaci=C3=B3n=
 de la <span>**GPO**</span> denominada <span>**Mapeo-Unidades-[INICIALES]**=
</span> para gestionar la automatizaci=C3=B3n.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"gpo" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/gpo1.png" &gt;&lt;/image-=
card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Mapear las unidades de red:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Para cada unidad, se debe marcar l=
a acci=C3=B3n como <span>**Crear**</span>, definir la <span>**ruta UNC**</s=
pan>, asignar la <span>**letra**</span> correspondiente y marcar la opci=C3=
=B3n de <span>**mostrar**</span>. En la pesta=C3=B1a <span>**Com=C3=BAn**</=
span>, se configura la <span>**Segmentaci=C3=B3n a nivel de elemento**</spa=
n> para asociar cada carpeta a su respectivo grupo de seguridad.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo1" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo1.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo2" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo2.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo3" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo3.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo4" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo4.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo5" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo5.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo6" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo6.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Todas las carpetas mapeadas:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Vista general de la configuraci=C3=
=B3n final de las tres unidades (Z:, Y:, X:) dentro de la <span>**GPO**</sp=
an>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"mapeo7" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/mapeo7.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Pruebas de correcto funcionamient=
o:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">#### Con el usuario user_admin1:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">El usuario perteneciente a <span>**GRP_Administracion*=
*</span> visualiza correctamente las unidades <span>**Z:**</span> y <span>*=
*X:**</span>.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba1" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/prueba1.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba2" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/prueba2.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">#### Con el usuario user_info1:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## El usuario perteneciente a <span>*=
*GRP_Informatica**</span> visualiza las unidades <span>**Y:**</span> y <spa=
n>**X:**</span>, y se verifica el <span>**acceso denegado**</span> al inten=
tar entrar en recursos no autorizados.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba3" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/prueba3.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba4" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/prueba4.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba5" src=3D"Capturas/Parte1/prueba5.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Parte 2: Automatizaci=C3=B3n de ej=
ecuci=C3=B3n de script de limpieza</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;"><span>**Objetivo:**</span> Crear una GPO que despliegu=
e y programe un script de mantenimiento en los equipos cliente para limpiar=
 archivos temporales sin intervenci=C3=B3n manual.</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Despliegue del Script</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Ubicaci=C3=B3n:**</span> El scri=
pt se encuentra en la ruta de red <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !f=
ont-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-o=
range-300">\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.local\scripts\</span> para asegurar su di=
sponibilidad en toda la red.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**GPO:**</span><span class=3D"text=
-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-ora=
nge-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mantenimiento-Automatico-YGM</span> vincul=
ada a la <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10=
 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">UO_Usuarios</s=
pan>.</li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Configuraci=C3=B3n de la Tarea Pr=
ogramada</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">La automatizaci=C3=B3n se ha configurado bajo "Tareas =
programadas" con las siguientes caracter=C3=ADsticas:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Ejecuci=C3=B3n:**</span> Semanal=
 con privilegios elevados.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Usuario:**</span> Se ejecuta con=
 la cuenta <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/=
10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">SYSTEM</span=
> para garantizar que no dependa de un usuario logueado.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Acci=C3=B3n:**</span> Ejecuci=C3=
=B3n de PowerShell apuntando al script en SYSVOL.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><span>**Registro:**</span> Se genera un =
log autom=C3=A1tico en <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg=
-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">=
C:\Logs</span> para verificar cada ejecuci=C3=B3n.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Script para la tarea:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Script que voy a usar para la tare=
a:
&lt;image-card alt=3D"script" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/script.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Script en la carpeta SYSVOL:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Guardar el script <span class=3D"t=
ext-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-=
orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.local\scripts\</=
span> para asegurar que sea accesible por todos los equipos del dominio.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"sysvol" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/sysvol.png" &gt;&lt;/i=
mage-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Crear la GPO Mantenimiento-Automa=
tico-YGM:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Crear una nueva <span>**GPO**</spa=
n> con el nombre Mantenimiento-Automatico-YGM
&lt;image-card alt=3D"gpo1" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo1.png" &gt;&lt;/image=
-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Crear la Tarea Programada:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Dentro de la configuraci=C3=B3n de=
 la GPO, definir una nueva <span>**Tarea programada (Windows 7 o posterior)=
**</span> configurada para ejecutarse con la cuenta <span>**SYSTEM**</span>=
 y los privilegios m=C3=A1s elevados.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"gpo2" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo2.png" &gt;&lt;/image=
-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Establecer el desencadenador:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Configurar el <span>**desencadenad=
or**</span> para establecer la frecuencia de ejecuci=C3=B3n autom=C3=A1tica=
 de la tarea.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"gpo3" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo3.png" &gt;&lt;/image=
-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Establecer la acci=C3=B3n:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Establecer la <span>**acci=C3=B3n*=
*</span> que ejecutar=C3=A1 el script, pasando como argumento la ruta del s=
cript alojado en el servidor.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"gpo4" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo4.png" &gt;&lt;/image=
-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Prueba con el usuario user_user1:=
</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Iniciar sesi=C3=B3n en el equipo c=
liente con el usuario de prueba.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba1" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/prueba1.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Ejecutar gpupdate /force:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Forzar la actualizaci=C3=B3n de la=
s directivas de grupo mediante el comando <span>**gpupdate /force**</span> =
para aplicar los cambios de la GPO inmediatamente.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba2" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/prueba2.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Verificaci=C3=B3n en el Programad=
or de tareas:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Tras abrir el <span>**Programador =
de tareas**</span> como administrador, buscar la tarea creada mediante GPO =
aparece correctamente en la biblioteca del cliente.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba3" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/prueba3.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Ejecuci=C3=B3n manual de la tarea=
:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">## Realizar una ejecuci=C3=B3n manual=
 de la tarea mediante la opci=C3=B3n <span>**Ejecutar**</span> para validar=
 el correcto funcionamiento del script en el equipo cliente.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba4" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/prueba4.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words">### Muestra del LOG creado:</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words" node=3D"[object Object]" style=3D"whi=
te-space: pre-wrap;">Verificar la creaci=C3=B3n del archivo de registro en =
<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-ora=
nge-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Logs</span>, confirm=
ando que el script se ha ejecutado con =C3=A9xito y ha realizado las tareas=
 de limpieza.
&lt;image-card alt=3D"prueba5" src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/prueba5.png" &gt;&lt;=
/image-card&gt;
&nbsp;
teniendo en cuenta el archivo quiero copiar a mi amigo, pero que sea con pa=
labras distintas, eso si todo lo que pida la tarea tiene que ser igual</p><=
/div></div><section class=3D"inline-media-container flex flex-col gap-1 cle=
ar-both"></section><section class=3D"auth-notification flex flex-col gap-1"=

ong class=3D"font-semibold">Tarea de Automatizaci=C3=B3n con GPOs</strong>
<strong class=3D"font-semibold">Alumno:</strong> [Tu nombre] =E2=80=93 Inic=
iales: <strong class=3D"font-semibold">YGM</strong></p>
<hr class=3D"border-border-l2 clear-both">
<h3 dir=3D"auto" class=3D"text-xl"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Parte 1:=
 Mapeo autom=C3=A1tico de unidades de red</strong></h3>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Objetivo:</strong>
Configurar el mapeo autom=C3=A1tico de unidades de red seg=C3=BAn el grupo =
de seguridad al que pertenezca el usuario mediante una Pol=C3=ADtica de Gru=
po.</p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Configuraci=C3=
=B3n de carpetas compartidas y permisos</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se crearon las siguientes carpetas en <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rou=
nded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 d=
ark:text-orange-300">C:\Compartidas\</span> del servidor y se configuraron =
los permisos de recurso compartido y NTFS eliminando el grupo =E2=80=9CTodo=
s=E2=80=9D para garantizar la seguridad:</p>

<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Permisos aplicados (tanto en pesta=C3=
=B1a Compartir como en Seguridad):</strong></p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Se elimin=C3=B3 el grupo =E2=80=9CTodos=
=E2=80=9D.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Se a=C3=B1adi=C3=B3 =C3=BAnicamente el g=
rupo correspondiente en cada carpeta.</li>
</ul>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Estructura de U=
nidades Organizativas (UO)</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se cre=C3=B3 la jerarqu=C3=ADa solicitada en Active Directory:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">UO_Administracion</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">UO_Informatica</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">UO_Usuarios</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">UO_Equipos_Politica</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">UO_Equipos_Control</li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Adem=C3=A1s, se crearon los grupos de seguridad <strong class=3D"font=
-semibold">GRP_Administracion</strong> y <strong class=3D"font-semibold">GR=
P_Informatica</strong> e incorporaron los usuarios correspondientes.</p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Creaci=C3=B3n y=
 configuraci=C3=B3n de la GPO</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Nombre de la GPO:</strong> <span clas=
s=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 da=
rk:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mapeo-Unidades-YGM</span></p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Ubicaci=C3=B3n en la GPO:</strong>
Configuraci=C3=B3n de usuario =E2=86=92 Preferencias =E2=86=92 Asignaciones=
 de unidad</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se configuraron tres unidades con la acci=C3=B3n <strong class=3D"fon=
t-semibold">Crear</strong>:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Z:</stro=
ng> =E2=86=92 <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-4=
00/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\servido=
r\Compartida-Admin</span></li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Y:</stro=
ng> =E2=86=92 <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-4=
00/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\servido=
r\Compartida-Info</span></li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">X:</stro=
ng> =E2=86=92 <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-4=
00/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\servido=
r\Compartida-Todos</span></li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Segmentaci=C3=B3n a nivel de elemento=
 (Item-Level Targeting):</strong>
En la pesta=C3=B1a <strong class=3D"font-semibold">Com=C3=BAn</strong> de c=
ada unidad se activ=C3=B3 la segmentaci=C3=B3n:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Unidad Z: solo usuarios del grupo <stron=
g class=3D"font-semibold">GRP_Administracion</strong></li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Unidad Y: solo usuarios del grupo <stron=
g class=3D"font-semibold">GRP_Informatica</strong></li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Unidad X: sin segmentaci=C3=B3n (visible=
 para todos)</li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Vinculaci=C3=B3n:</strong>
La GPO se vincul=C3=B3 a las tres UOs:
<strong class=3D"font-semibold">UO_Administracion</strong>, <strong class=
=3D"font-semibold">UO_Informatica</strong> y <strong class=3D"font-semibold=
">UO_Usuarios</strong>.</p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Pruebas de veri=
ficaci=C3=B3n</strong></h4>

e;"><svg width=3D"16" height=3D"16" viewBox=3D"0 0 24 24" fill=3D"none" xml=

 y=3D"8" width=3D"13" height=3D"13" rx=3D"4" stroke=3D"currentColor"></rect=

></button><button class=3D"inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 wh=
itespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium leading-[normal] cursor-pointer focus-v=
isible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:o=
pacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors duration-100 [&amp;=
_svg]:shrink-0 select-none text-fg-secondary hover:text-fg-primary hover:bg=

sparent [&amp;_svg]:hover:text-fg-primary h-8 w-8 rounded-full" type=3D"but=
ton" aria-label=3D"Guardar tabla" data-state=3D"closed"><svg width=3D"16" h=
eight=3D"16" viewBox=3D"0 0 24 24" fill=3D"none" xmlns=3D"http://www.w3.org=
/2000/svg" class=3D"stroke-[2] size-4"><path stroke=3D"currentColor" d=3D"M=
11.996 3v12m0 0-5-5m5 5 5-5M4 15v1a4 4 0 0 0 4 4h8a4 4 0 0 0 4-4v-1"></path=
></svg></button></div></div>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se comprob=C3=B3 adem=C3=A1s que un usuario de Inform=C3=A1tica recib=
e <strong class=3D"font-semibold">=E2=80=9CAcceso denegado=E2=80=9D</strong=
> al intentar acceder directamente a <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm=
 !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:tex=
t-orange-300">\\servidor\Compartida-Admin</span>.</p>
<hr class=3D"border-border-l2 clear-both">
<h3 dir=3D"auto" class=3D"text-xl"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Parte 2:=
 Script de limpieza autom=C3=A1tico</strong></h3>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Objetivo:</strong>
Desplegar y programar autom=C3=A1ticamente un script de limpieza de archivo=
s temporales mediante GPO sin intervenci=C3=B3n manual del usuario.</p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Script utilizad=
o</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">El script realiza:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Limpieza de carpetas temporales del sist=
ema (<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 tex=
t-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">%TEMP%</span>, <sp=
an class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange=
-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Windows\Temp</span>, et=
c.)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Generaci=C3=B3n de un log detallado en <=
span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-oran=
ge-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Logs\Limpieza_[fecha]=
.log</span></li>
</ul>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Ubicaci=C3=B3n =
del script</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se copi=C3=B3 el script a la carpeta SYSVOL para que est=C3=A9 dispon=
ible en toda la red:
<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-ora=
nge-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.=
local\scripts\Limpieza-Temporal.ps1</span></p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Creaci=C3=B3n d=
e la GPO</strong></h4>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Nombre de la GPO:</strong> <span clas=
s=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 da=
rk:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mantenimiento-Automatico-YGM</spa=
n></p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Configuraci=C3=B3n:</strong>
Configuraci=C3=B3n del equipo =E2=86=92 Preferencias =E2=86=92 Panel de con=
trol =E2=86=92 Tareas programadas</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Se cre=C3=B3 una <strong class=3D"font-semibold">Tarea programada (Wi=
ndows 7 o posterior)</strong> con las siguientes caracter=C3=ADsticas:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Nombre:<=
/strong> Limpieza-Temporal-Semanal</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Ejecuci=
=C3=B3n:</strong> Semanal (d=C3=ADa y hora elegidos por el alumno)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Cuenta:<=
/strong> SYSTEM</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Privileg=
ios:</strong> Ejecutar con los privilegios m=C3=A1s elevados</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Acci=C3=
=B3n:</strong> Iniciar un programa =E2=86=92 <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 ro=
unded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 =
dark:text-orange-300">powershell.exe</span></li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Argument=
os:</strong><span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400=
/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">-ExecutionP=
olicy Bypass -File "\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.local\scripts\Limpieza-Temporal.=
ps1"</span></li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Vinculaci=C3=B3n:</strong>
La GPO se vincul=C3=B3 exclusivamente a la <strong class=3D"font-semibold">=
UO_Usuarios</strong>.</p>
<h4 dir=3D"auto" class=3D""><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Pruebas de veri=
ficaci=C3=B3n en el cliente</strong></h4>
<ol dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Inicio de sesi=C3=B3n con usuario de pru=
eba (user_user1).</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Ejecuci=C3=B3n del comando <span class=
=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dar=
k:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">gpupdate /force</span>.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Apertura del <strong class=3D"font-semib=
old">Programador de tareas</strong> (<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm=
 !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:tex=
t-orange-300">taskschd.msc</span>) =E2=86=92 la tarea aparece correctamente=
.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Ejecuci=C3=B3n manual de la tarea para c=
omprobar su funcionamiento.</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Verificaci=C3=B3n del log generado en <s=
pan class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orang=
e-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">C:\Logs</span>.</li>
</ol>
<hr class=3D"border-border-l2 clear-both">
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Documentaci=C3=B3n adicional (GitHub)=
</strong>
En el repositorio se cre=C3=B3 una carpeta <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 roun=
ded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 da=
rk:text-orange-300">Practica1-Automatizacion-Windows</span> con:</p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Este documento completo (README.md)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Capturas de todas las configuraciones (p=
ermisos NTFS y compartidos, GPOs, segmentaci=C3=B3n, programador de tareas,=
 log generado, etc.)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Explicaci=C3=B3n de por qu=C3=A9 se elim=
in=C3=B3 el grupo =E2=80=9CTodos=E2=80=9D y se us=C3=B3 segmentaci=C3=B3n.<=
/li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Evidencias incluidas (tal como exige =
la pr=C3=A1ctica):</strong></p>
<ul dir=3D"auto" class=3D"marker:text-secondary">
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Estructura de carpetas en el servidor</l=
i>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Permisos de recurso compartido y NTFS de=
 las tres carpetas</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">GPO de mapeo creada, configurada y vincu=
lada</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Detalle de las tres unidades y su segmen=
taci=C3=B3n</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Capturas del Explorador de archivos de u=
ser_admin1 y user_info1</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Intento de acceso denegado</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">GPO de mantenimiento creada y vinculada<=
/li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Configuraci=C3=B3n completa de la tarea =
programada (pesta=C3=B1as General, Desencadenadores y Acciones)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Tarea visible en el cliente</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal">Ejecuci=C3=B3n exitosas y contenido del =
log generado</li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Todo el trabajo se ha realizado siguiendo exactamente los requisitos =
funcionales y evidencias solicitadas en el enunciado.</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">=C2=A1Listo para entregar!
Puedes copiar y pegar directamente este texto (solo cambia tu nombre si qui=
eres).</p></div></div><section class=3D"inline-media-container flex flex-co=

<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =

<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">## Parte 1: Mapeo Autom=C3=A1tico de Unidades de Red</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Objetivo**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">  </sp=
an></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Configurar =
el mapeo autom=C3=A1tico de unidades de red seg=C3=BAn el grupo de segurida=
d al que pertenece el usuario mediante una Pol=C3=ADtica de Grupo (GPO).</s=
pan></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Estructura de Unidades Organizativas (UO) y Grupos</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se ha cread=
o la siguiente estructura en Active Directory:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">![</span><s=
pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">uo</span><span style=3D"color: rgb=
(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); text-d=
ecoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/uo.png</span><span style=3D"color: r=
gb(230, 230, 230);">)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Grupos de seguridad creados:**</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(103, 150, 230);">-</span><sp=
an style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"> GRP_Administracion (con user_admin=
1 y user_admin2)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(103, 150, 230);">-</span><sp=
an style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"> GRP_Informatica (con user_info1 y =
user_info2)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Carpetas Compartidas en el Servidor</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se crearon =
las carpetas en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">`C:\Compa=
rtidas\`</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>

pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">carpetas</span><span style=3D"colo=
r: rgb(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); =

<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Configuraci=C3=B3n de Permisos</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se elimin=
=C3=B3 el grupo =E2=80=9CTodos=E2=80=9D en las carpetas restringidas y se a=
plicaron permisos tanto en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); =
font-weight: bold;">**Recurso compartido**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(=
230, 230, 230);"> como en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); f=
ont-weight: bold;">**NTFS**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);=
">:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">| Carpeta c=
ompartida     | Ruta local                        | Grupo con acceso       =

--------------|-----------------------------------|------------------------=
---|---------------|</span></span>

<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">## Parte 2: Script de Limpieza Autom=C3=A1tico</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>

bold;">**Objetivo**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">  </sp=
an></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Desplegar y=
 programar autom=C3=A1ticamente un script de limpieza de archivos temporale=
s mediante GPO, sin intervenci=C3=B3n del usuario.</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Script Utilizado</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">```powershe=
ll</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"># Limpieza-=
Temporal.ps1</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">$$   logPat=
h =3D "C:\Logs\Limpieza_   $$(Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd_HHmmss).log"</span>=
</span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"=3D=3D=3D =
Limpieza iniciada: $(Get-Date) =3D=3D=3D" | Out-File $logPath</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Remove-Item=
 -Path "$env:TEMP\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue</span></=
span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Remove-Item=
 -Path "C:\Windows\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue</s=
pan></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"Archivos t=
emporales eliminados correctamente." | Out-File $logPath -Append</span></sp=
an>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"=3D=3D=3D =
Limpieza finalizada: $(Get-Date) =3D=3D=3D" | Out-File $logPath -Append</sp=
an></span></code></pre></div><div></div></div><div class=3D"false flex flex=
-col gap-2 h-full"></div></div></div>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/script.png" alt=3D"script"&gt;</p>
<h3 dir=3D"auto" class=3D"text-xl">Ubicaci=C3=B3n del Script en SYSVOL</h3>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/sysvol.png" alt=3D"sysvol"&gt;</p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">Ruta completa:
<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-ora=
nge-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.=
local\scripts\Limpieza-Temporal.ps1</span></p>
<h3 dir=3D"auto" class=3D"text-xl">Creaci=C3=B3n de la GPO</h3>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Nombre de la GPO:</strong> <span clas=
s=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 da=
rk:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mantenimiento-Automatico-YGM</spa=
n></p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo1.png" alt=3D"gpo1"&gt;</p>

rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Configuraci=C3=B3n de la Tarea Progra=
mada:</strong></p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo2.png" alt=3D"gpo2"&gt;

l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Desencad=
enador:</strong> Semanal (d=C3=ADa y hora elegidos)</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Cuenta:<=

l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Privileg=
ios:</strong> Ejecutar con los privilegios m=C3=A1s elevados</li>
<li class=3D"break-words whitespace-pre-wrap [&amp;&gt;ul]:whitespace-norma=
l [&amp;&gt;ol]:whitespace-normal"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Acci=C3=
=B3n:</strong><span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-4=
00/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">powershel=
l.exe</span> con argumento <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mon=
o bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-3=
00">-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "\\YGM.local\SYSVOL\YGM.local\scripts\Lim=
pieza-Temporal.ps1"</span></li>
</ul>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Vinculaci=C3=B3n:</strong> Solo a <sp=
an class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange=
-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">UO_Usuarios</span></p>

; font-weight: bold;"># Tarea de Automatizaci=C3=B3n con GPOs - Windows Ser=

<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =

<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">---</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">## Parte 1: Mapeo Autom=C3=A1tico de Unidades de Red</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Objetivo**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">  </sp=
an></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Configurar =
el mapeo autom=C3=A1tico de unidades de red seg=C3=BAn el grupo de segurida=
d al que pertenece el usuario mediante una Pol=C3=ADtica de Grupo (GPO).</s=
pan></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Estructura de Unidades Organizativas (UO) y Grupos</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se ha cread=
o la siguiente estructura en Active Directory:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">![</span><s=
pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">uo</span><span style=3D"color: rgb=
(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); text-d=
ecoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/uo.png</span><span style=3D"color: r=
gb(230, 230, 230);">)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Grupos de seguridad creados:**</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(103, 150, 230);">-</span><sp=
an style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"> GRP_Administracion (con user_admin=
1 y user_admin2)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(103, 150, 230);">-</span><sp=
an style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"> GRP_Informatica (con user_info1 y =
user_info2)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Carpetas Compartidas en el Servidor</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se crearon =
las carpetas en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">`C:\Compa=
rtidas\`</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">![</span><s=
pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">carpetas</span><span style=3D"colo=
r: rgb(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); =
text-decoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/compartidas.png</span><span st=
yle=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Configuraci=C3=B3n de Permisos</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Se elimin=
=C3=B3 el grupo =E2=80=9CTodos=E2=80=9D en las carpetas restringidas y se a=
plicaron permisos tanto en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); =
font-weight: bold;">**Recurso compartido**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(=
230, 230, 230);"> como en </span><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); f=
ont-weight: bold;">**NTFS**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);=
">:</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">| Carpeta c=
ompartida     | Ruta local                        | Grupo con acceso       =
   | Justificaci=C3=B3n |</span></span>

--------------|-----------------------------------|------------------------=
---|---------------|</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">| </span><s=

in**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">   | </span><span sty=
le=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">`C:\Compartidas\Admin`</span><span style=

ext-decoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/prueba2.png</span><span style=
=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Con usuario de Inform=C3=A1tica (user_info1):**</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>

pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">prueba3</span><span style=3D"color=
: rgb(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); t=
ext-decoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/prueba3.png</span><span style=
=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">)  </span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">![</span><s=
pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">prueba4</span><span style=3D"color=
: rgb(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); t=
ext-decoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/prueba4.png</span><span style=
=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">)  </span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">![</span><s=
pan style=3D"color: rgb(206, 145, 120);">prueba5</span><span style=3D"color=
: rgb(230, 230, 230);">](</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230); t=
ext-decoration: underline;">Capturas/Parte1/prueba5.png</span><span style=
=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">)</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Acceso denegado correcto:**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 2=
30, 230);"> Usuario de Inform=C3=A1tica no puede acceder a Compartida-Admin=
.</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">---</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">## Parte 2: Script de Limpieza Autom=C3=A1tico</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">**Objetivo**</span><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">  </sp=
an></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Desplegar y=
 programar autom=C3=A1ticamente un script de limpieza de archivos temporale=
s mediante GPO, sin intervenci=C3=B3n del usuario.</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(86, 156, 214); font-weight: =
bold;">### Script Utilizado</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">```powershe=
ll</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);"># Limpieza-=
Temporal.ps1</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">$$   logPat=
h =3D "C:\Logs\Limpieza_   $$(Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd_HHmmss).log"</span>=
</span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"=3D=3D=3D =
Limpieza iniciada: $(Get-Date) =3D=3D=3D" | Out-File $logPath</span></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Remove-Item=
 -Path "$env:TEMP\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue</span></=
span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">Remove-Item=
 -Path "C:\Windows\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue</s=
pan></span>
<span class=3D"line"></span>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"Archivos t=
emporales eliminados correctamente." | Out-File $logPath -Append</span></sp=
an>
<span class=3D"line"><span style=3D"color: rgb(230, 230, 230);">"=3D=3D=3D =
Limpieza finalizada: $(Get-Date) =3D=3D=3D" | Out-File $logPath -Append</sp=
an></span></code></pre></div><div></div></div><div class=3D"false flex flex=
-col gap-2 h-full"></div></div></div>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/script.png" alt=3D"script"&gt;</p>
<h3 dir=3D"auto" class=3D"text-xl">Ubicaci=C3=B3n del Script en SYSVOL</h3>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/sysvol.png" alt=3D"sysvol"&gt;</p>

rap;">Ruta completa:
<span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-ora=
nge-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">\\JPP.local\SYSVOL\JPP.=
local\scripts\Limpieza-Temporal.ps1</span></p>

<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Nombre de la GPO:</strong> <span clas=
s=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mono bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 da=
rk:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">Mantenimiento-Automatico-JPP</spa=
n></p>

rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo1.png" alt=3D"gpo1"&gt;</p>

rap;"><strong class=3D"font-semibold">Configuraci=C3=B3n de la Tarea Progra=
mada:</strong></p>
<p dir=3D"auto" class=3D"break-words last:mb-0" style=3D"white-space: pre-w=
rap;">&lt;img src=3D"Capturas/Parte2/gpo2.png" alt=3D"gpo2"&gt;

enador:</strong> Semanal (d=C3=ADa y hora elegidos)</li>

ios:</strong> Ejecutar con los privilegios m=C3=A1s elevados</li>

00/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-300">powershel=
l.exe</span> con argumento <span class=3D"text-sm px-1 rounded-sm !font-mon=
o bg-orange-400/10 text-orange-500 dark:bg-orange-300/10 dark:text-orange-3=
00">-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "\\JPP.local\SYSVOL\JPP.local\scripts\Lim=
pieza-Temporal.ps1"</span></li>

@charset "utf-8";

.monaco-action-bar { height: 100%; white-space: nowrap; }

.monaco-action-bar .actions-container { align-items: center; display: flex;=
 height: 100%; margin: 0px auto; padding: 0px; width: 100%; }

.monaco-action-bar.vertical .actions-container { display: inline-block; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; dis=
play: block; justify-content: center; position: relative; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item.disabled { cursor: default; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item .codicon, .monaco-action-bar .action-item .=
icon { display: block; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item .codicon { align-items: center; display: fl=
ex; height: 16px; width: 16px; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-label { border-radius: 5px; display: flex; font-=
size: 11px; padding: 3px; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item.disabled .action-label, .monaco-action-bar =
.action-item.disabled .action-label::before, .monaco-action-bar .action-ite=
m.disabled .action-label:hover { color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground); }

.monaco-action-bar.vertical { text-align: left; }

.monaco-action-bar.vertical .action-item { display: block; }

lid rgb(187, 187, 187); display: block; margin-left: 0.8em; margin-right: 0=
.8em; padding-top: 1px; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item .action-label.separator { background-color:=
 rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; height: 16px; min-width: 1px; padding=
: 0px; width: 1px; margin: 5px 4px !important; }

.secondary-actions .monaco-action-bar .action-label { margin-left: 6px; }

play: flex; flex: 1 1 0%; justify-content: center; margin-right: 10px; max-=
width: 170px; min-width: 60px; overflow: hidden; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item.action-dropdown-item { display: flex; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item.action-dropdown-item > .action-dropdown-ite=
m-separator { align-items: center; cursor: default; display: flex; }

.monaco-action-bar .action-item.action-dropdown-item > .action-dropdown-ite=
m-separator > div { width: 1px; }

.monaco-aria-container { left: -999em; position: absolute; }

.monaco-text-button { align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--vscode-b=
utton-border,transparent); border-radius: 2px; box-sizing: border-box; curs=
or: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: center; line-height: 18px; pad=
ding: 4px; text-align: center; width: 100%; }

.monaco-text-button:focus { outline-offset: 2px !important; }

.monaco-text-button:hover { text-decoration: none !important; }

.monaco-button.disabled, .monaco-button.disabled:focus { cursor: default; o=
pacity: 0.4 !important; }

; }

height: 28px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 4px; }

.monaco-text-button.monaco-text-button-with-short-label > .monaco-button-la=
bel { flex-basis: 100%; }

.monaco-text-button.monaco-text-button-with-short-label > .monaco-button-la=
bel-short { flex-grow: 1; overflow: hidden; width: 0px; }

.monaco-text-button.monaco-text-button-with-short-label > .monaco-button-la=
bel, .monaco-text-button.monaco-text-button-with-short-label > .monaco-butt=
on-label-short { align-items: center; display: flex; font-style: inherit; f=
ont-weight: 400; justify-content: center; padding: 4px 0px; }

.monaco-button-dropdown { cursor: pointer; display: flex; }

.monaco-button-dropdown.disabled { cursor: default; }

.monaco-button-dropdown > .monaco-button:focus { outline-offset: -1px !impo=
rtant; }

co-button-dropdown.disabled > .monaco-button.disabled, .monaco-button-dropd=
own.disabled > .monaco-button.disabled:focus { opacity: 0.4 !important; }

width: 0px !important; }

ontent: center; }

ault-colors { background-color: var(--vscode-button-background); color: var=

ound); }

ondaryBackground); color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); }

utton-dropdown-separator { background-color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryB=
ackground); }

ransform: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; user-select: none; }

.monaco-count-badge { border-radius: 11px; box-sizing: border-box; display:=
 inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 11px; min-he=
ight: 18px; min-width: 18px; padding: 3px 6px; text-align: center; }

.monaco-count-badge.long { border-radius: 2px; line-height: normal; min-hei=
ght: auto; padding: 2px 3px; }

.monaco-dropdown { height: 100%; padding: 0px; }

.monaco-dropdown > .dropdown-label { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; =
display: flex; height: 100%; justify-content: center; }

.monaco-dropdown > .dropdown-label > .action-label.disabled { cursor: defau=
lt; }

.monaco-dropdown-with-primary { border-radius: 5px; flex-direction: row; di=
splay: flex !important; }

.monaco-dropdown-with-primary > .action-container > .action-label { margin-=
right: 0px; }

.monaco-dropdown-with-primary > .dropdown-action-container > .monaco-dropdo=
wn > .dropdown-label .codicon[class*=3D"codicon-"] { font-size: 12px; line-=
height: 16px; margin-left: -3px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; }

.monaco-dropdown-with-primary > .dropdown-action-container > .monaco-dropdo=
wn > .dropdown-label > .action-label { background-position: 50% center; bac=
kground-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 16px; display: block; }

.monaco-findInput { position: relative; }

.monaco-findInput .monaco-inputbox { font-size: 13px; width: 100%; }

.monaco-findInput > .controls { position: absolute; right: 2px; top: 3px; }

.vs .monaco-findInput.disabled { background-color: rgb(225, 225, 225); }

.vs-dark .monaco-findInput.disabled { background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }

.hc-light .monaco-findInput.highlight-0 .controls, .monaco-findInput.highli=
ght-0 .controls { animation: 0.1s linear 0s 1 normal none running monaco-fi=
ndInput-highlight-0; }

.hc-light .monaco-findInput.highlight-1 .controls, .monaco-findInput.highli=
ght-1 .controls { animation: 0.1s linear 0s 1 normal none running monaco-fi=
ndInput-highlight-1; }

.hc-black .monaco-findInput.highlight-0 .controls, .vs-dark .monaco-findInp=
ut.highlight-0 .controls { animation: 0.1s linear 0s 1 normal none running =
monaco-findInput-highlight-dark-0; }

.hc-black .monaco-findInput.highlight-1 .controls, .vs-dark .monaco-findInp=
ut.highlight-1 .controls { animation: 0.1s linear 0s 1 normal none running =
monaco-findInput-highlight-dark-1; }

@keyframes monaco-findInput-highlight-0 {=20
  0% { background: rgba(253, 255, 0, 0.8); }
  100% { background: transparent; }
}

@keyframes monaco-findInput-highlight-1 {=20
  0% { background: rgba(253, 255, 0, 0.8); }
  99% { background: transparent; }
}

@keyframes monaco-findInput-highlight-dark-0 {=20
  0% { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); }
  100% { background: transparent; }
}

@keyframes monaco-findInput-highlight-dark-1 {=20
  0% { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); }
  99% { background: transparent; }
}

-sizing: border-box; cursor: default; line-height: 1.5em; overflow: hidden;=
 position: absolute; user-select: text; white-space: var(--vscode-hover-whi=
teSpace,normal); }

.monaco-hover.hidden { display: none; }

}

r { min-width: 100%; }

.monaco-hover h4, .monaco-hover h5, .monaco-hover h6, .monaco-hover p, .mon=
aco-hover ul { margin: 8px 0px; }

.monaco-hover h1, .monaco-hover h2, .monaco-hover h3, .monaco-hover h4, .mo=
naco-hover h5, .monaco-hover h6 { line-height: 1.1; }

.monaco-hover code { font-family: var(--monaco-monospace-font); }

.monaco-hover hr { border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; box-sizing: border-=
box; height: 1px; margin: 4px -8px -4px; }

.monaco-hover .code:first-child, .monaco-hover p:first-child, .monaco-hover=
 ul:first-child { margin-top: 0px; }

.monaco-hover .code:last-child, .monaco-hover p:last-child, .monaco-hover u=
l:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; }

.monaco-hover ol, .monaco-hover ul { padding-left: 20px; }

.monaco-hover li > p { margin-bottom: 0px; }

.monaco-hover li > ul { margin-top: 0px; }

.monaco-hover code { border-radius: 3px; padding: 0px 0.4em; }

urceWhiteSpace,pre-wrap); }

.monaco-hover .hover-row.status-bar .info { font-style: italic; padding: 0p=
x 8px; }

.monaco-hover .hover-row.status-bar .actions { display: flex; padding: 0px =
8px; width: 100%; }

.monaco-hover .hover-row.status-bar .actions .action-container { cursor: po=
inter; margin-right: 16px; }

.monaco-hover .hover-row.status-bar .actions .action-container .action .ico=
n { padding-right: 4px; }

.monaco-hover .markdown-hover .hover-contents .codicon { color: inherit; fo=
nt-size: inherit; vertical-align: middle; }

.monaco-hover .hover-contents a.code-link, .monaco-hover .hover-contents a.=
code-link:hover { color: inherit; }

.monaco-hover .hover-contents a.code-link::before { content: "("; }

.monaco-hover .hover-contents a.code-link::after { content: ")"; }

 transparent; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); text-decoration: un=
derline; text-underline-position: under; }

.monaco-hover .hover-contents a.code-link > span:hover { color: var(--vscod=
e-textLink-activeForeground); }

(.html-hover-contents) span { display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 4px; }

.monaco-hover-content .action-container a { user-select: none; }

.monaco-hover-content .action-container.disabled { cursor: default; opacity=
: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

.monaco-icon-label { display: flex; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellips=
is; }

.monaco-icon-label::before { background-position: 0px center; background-re=
peat: no-repeat; background-size: 16px; display: inline-block; height: 22px=
; padding-right: 6px; width: 16px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; fle=
x-shrink: 0; vertical-align: top; line-height: inherit !important; }

.monaco-icon-label-iconpath { display: flex; height: 16px; margin-top: 2px;=

.monaco-icon-label-container.disabled { color: var(--vscode-disabledForegro=
und); }

.monaco-icon-label > .monaco-icon-label-container { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width=
: 0px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

.monaco-icon-label > .monaco-icon-label-container > .monaco-icon-name-conta=
iner > .label-name { color: inherit; white-space: pre; }

.monaco-icon-label > .monaco-icon-label-container > .monaco-icon-name-conta=
iner > .label-name > .label-separator { margin: 0px 2px; opacity: 0.5; }

.monaco-icon-label > .monaco-icon-label-container > .monaco-icon-suffix-con=
tainer > .label-suffix { opacity: 0.7; white-space: pre; }

n-container > .label-description { font-size: 0.9em; margin-left: 0.5em; op=
acity: 0.7; white-space: pre; }

iming-function: linear; transform: translateZ(0px); }

  0% { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(1); }
  50% { transform: translateX(2500%) scaleX(3); }
  100% { transform: translateX(4900%) scaleX(1); }

.monaco-sash.vertical > .orthogonal-drag-handle.end { bottom: calc(var(--vs=

.monaco-sash.horizontal > .orthogonal-drag-handle.start { left: calc(var(--=

scode-sash-size)*-1); top: calc(var(--vscode-sash-size)*-.5); }

  0%, 20% { opacity: 1; }
  60%, 100% { opacity: 0; }

  90%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
}

  80%, 100% { transform: scaleY(0); }

order-box; cursor: default; display: flex; font-size: 12px; height: 26px; o=
verflow: visible; width: 100%; }

hrink: 0; padding: 0px 6px 0px 10px; }

rap; }

kdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-ba=
ckdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --t=
w-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw=
-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-=
style: ; }

*, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: border-box; border-style: solid; border-=
width: 0px; border-color: hsl(var(--gray-200)); }

::before, ::after { --tw-content: ""; }

html, :host { text-size-adjust: 100%; tab-size: 4; line-height: 1.5; font-f=
amily: var(--font-universal-sans),ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif,"Apple=
 Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto Color Emoji"; font-f=
eature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; -webkit-tap-highl=
ight-color: transparent; }

body { line-height: inherit; margin: 0px; }

hr { height: 0px; color: inherit; border-top-width: 1px; }

abbr:where([title]) { text-decoration: underline dotted; }

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; }

a { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; }

b, strong { font-weight: bolder; }

code, kbd, samp, pre { font-family: var(--font-ibm-plex-mono),ui-monospace,=
SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monosp=
ace; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-s=
ize: 1em; }

small { font-size: 80%; }

sub, sup { vertical-align: baseline; font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; positi=
on: relative; }

sub { bottom: -0.25em; }

sup { top: -0.5em; }

table { text-indent: 0px; border-color: inherit; border-collapse: collapse;=
 }

button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { font-feature-settings: inherit;=
 font-variation-settings: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: 100%; f=
ont-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: =
inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

button, select { text-transform: none; }

button { appearance: button; background-color: transparent; background-imag=
e: none; }

input:where([type=3D"button"]) { appearance: button; background-color: tran=
sparent; background-image: none; }

input:where([type=3D"reset"]) { appearance: button; background-color: trans=
parent; background-image: none; }

input:where([type=3D"submit"]) { appearance: button; background-color: tran=
sparent; background-image: none; }

progress { vertical-align: baseline; }

::-webkit-inner-spin-button { height: auto; }

::-webkit-outer-spin-button { height: auto; }

[type=3D"search"] { appearance: textfield; outline-offset: -2px; }

::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; }

::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; font: inherit; }

summary { display: list-item; }

blockquote, dl, dd, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, hr, figure, p, pre { margin: 0p=
x; }

fieldset { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

legend { padding: 0px; }

ol, ul, menu { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; list-style: none; }

dialog { padding: 0px; }

textarea { resize: vertical; }

input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { opacity: 1; color: hsl(var(--gr=
ay-400)); }

button, [role=3D"button"] { cursor: pointer; }

:disabled { cursor: default; }

img, svg, video, canvas, audio, iframe, embed, object { vertical-align: mid=
dle; display: block; }

img, video { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }

[hidden]:where(:not([hidden=3D"until-found"])) { display: none; }

; }

* { border-color: var(--border-l1); }

body { background-color: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); }

.\!container { width: 100% !important; }

.container { width: 100%; }

@media (min-width: 375px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 375px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 375px; }
}

@media (min-width: 640px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 640px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 640px; }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 768px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 768px; }
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 1024px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 1024px; }
}

@media (min-width: 1280px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 1280px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 1280px; }
}

@media (min-width: 1536px) {
  .\!container { max-width: 1536px !important; }
  .container { max-width: 1536px; }
}

.prose { color: var(--tw-prose-body); max-width: 65ch; }

.prose :where(p):not(:where([class~=3D"not-prose"], [class~=3D"not-prose"] =
*)) { margin-top: var(--paragraph-margin); margin-bottom: var(--paragraph-m=
argin); color: hsl(var(--primary)/100%); }

.prose :where([class~=3D"lead"]):not(:where([class~=3D"not-prose"], [class~=
=3D"not-prose"] *)) { color: var(--tw-prose-lead); margin-top: 1.2em; margi=
n-bottom: 1.2em; font-size: 1.25em; line-height: 1.6; }

.prose :where(a):not(:where([class~=3D"not-prose"], [class~=3D"not-prose"] =
*)) { color: var(--link); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; }

.prose :where(a):not(:where([class~=3D"not-prose"], [class~=3D"not-prose"] =

.animate-\[loading-dots_1s_infinite_0\.2s\] { animation: 1s ease 0.2s infin=
ite normal none running loading-dots; }

.animate-\[loading-dots_1s_infinite_0\.4s\] { animation: 1s ease 0.4s infin=
ite normal none running loading-dots; }

.animate-\[loading-dots_1s_infinite_0\.6s\] { animation: 1s ease 0.6s infin=
ite normal none running loading-dots; }

@keyframes pulse {=20
  50% { opacity: 0.5; }
}

.animate-\[pulse_3s_ease-in-out_infinite\] { animation: 3s ease-in-out 0s i=
nfinite normal none running pulse; }

@keyframes spin {=20
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.animate-\[spin_3s_linear_infinite\] { animation: 3s linear 0s infinite nor=
mal none running spin; }

@keyframes accordion-down {=20
  0% { height: 0px; }
  100% { height: var(--radix-accordion-content-height); }
}

.animate-accordion-down { animation: 0.2s ease-out 0s 1 normal none running=
 accordion-down; }

@keyframes bounce {=20
  0%, 100% { animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.8, 0, 1, 1); transfo=
rm: translateY(-25%); }
  50% { animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: t=
ranslateY(0px); }
}

.animate-bounce { animation: 1s ease 0s infinite normal none running bounce=
; }

@keyframes fadeIn {=20
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

.animate-fadein { animation: 0.3s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running fade=
In; }

@keyframes gaussian {=20
  0% { opacity: 0; filter: blur(3px); }
  100% { opacity: 0.5; filter: blur(); }
}

.animate-gaussian { animation: 0.1s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running ga=
ussian; }

.animate-none { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.animate-pulse { animation: 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) 0s infinite nor=
mal none running pulse; }

@keyframes pulse-lg {=20
  50% { opacity: 0.3; }
}

.animate-pulse-lg { animation: 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) 0s infinit=
e normal none running pulse-lg; }

@keyframes shimmer-sweep {=20
  0% { background-position: 100% center; }
  100% { background-position: 0% center; }
}

.animate-shimmer-sweep { animation: 1s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal forwards run=
ning shimmer-sweep; }

@keyframes shiny-text {=20
  0%, 90%, 100% { background-position: calc(-100% - var(--shiny-width))0; }
  30%, 60% { background-position: calc(100% + var(--shiny-width))0; }
}

.animate-shiny-text { animation: 4s ease 0s infinite normal none running sh=
iny-text; }

.animate-spin { animation: 1s linear 0s infinite normal none running spin; =
}

.\!font-mono { font-family: var(--font-ibm-plex-mono),ui-monospace,SFMono-R=
egular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monospace !imp=
ortant; }

i,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto C=
olor Emoji"; }

ular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monospace; }

i,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto C=
olor Emoji"; }

.font-medium { font-weight: 500; }

.font-semibold { font-weight: 550; }

.uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }

.lowercase { text-transform: lowercase; }

.capitalize { text-transform: capitalize; }

.italic { font-style: italic; }

r(--tw-slashed-zero)var(--tw-numeric-figure)var(--tw-numeric-spacing)var(--=
tw-numeric-fraction); }

ric-spacing)var(--tw-numeric-fraction); }

.transition-transform { transition-property: transform; transition-duration=
: 0.15s; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.delay-1000 { transition-delay: 1s; }

.\!duration-0 { transition-duration: 0s !important; }

.\!duration-100 { transition-duration: 0.1s !important; }

.\!duration-1000 { transition-duration: 1s !important; }

.duration-0 { transition-duration: 0s; }

.duration-100 { transition-duration: 0.1s; }

.duration-1000 { transition-duration: 1s; }

.duration-150 { transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.duration-200 { transition-duration: 0.2s; }

.duration-300 { transition-duration: 0.3s; }

.duration-500 { transition-duration: 0.5s; }

.duration-700 { transition-duration: 0.7s; }

.ease-in-out { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.ease-linear { transition-timing-function: linear; }

.ease-out { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.will-change-transform { will-change: transform; }

@keyframes enter {=20
  0% { opacity: var(--tw-enter-opacity,1); transform: translate3d(var(--tw-=
enter-translate-x,0),var(--tw-enter-translate-y,0),0)scale3d(var(--tw-enter=
-scale,1),var(--tw-enter-scale,1),var(--tw-enter-scale,1))rotate(var(--tw-e=
nter-rotate,0)); }
}

@keyframes exit {=20
  100% { opacity: var(--tw-exit-opacity,1); transform: translate3d(var(--tw=
-exit-translate-x,0),var(--tw-exit-translate-y,0),0)scale3d(var(--tw-exit-s=
cale,1),var(--tw-exit-scale,1),var(--tw-exit-scale,1))rotate(var(--tw-exit-=
rotate,0)); }
}

.animate-in { --tw-enter-opacity: initial; --tw-enter-scale: initial; --tw-=
enter-rotate: initial; --tw-enter-translate-x: initial; --tw-enter-translat=
e-y: initial; animation-name: enter; animation-duration: 0.15s; }

.fade-in, .fade-in-0 { --tw-enter-opacity: 0; }

.zoom-in-95 { --tw-enter-scale: .95; }

.slide-in-from-bottom { --tw-enter-translate-y: 100%; }

.\!duration-0 { animation-duration: 0s !important; }

.\!duration-100 { animation-duration: 0.1s !important; }

.\!duration-1000 { animation-duration: 1s !important; }

.duration-0 { animation-duration: 0s; }

.duration-100 { animation-duration: 0.1s; }

.duration-1000 { animation-duration: 1s; }

.duration-150 { animation-duration: 0.15s; }

.duration-200 { animation-duration: 0.2s; }

.duration-300 { animation-duration: 0.3s; }

.duration-500 { animation-duration: 0.5s; }

.duration-700 { animation-duration: 0.7s; }

.delay-1000 { animation-delay: 1s; }

.ease-in-out { animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.ease-linear { animation-timing-function: linear; }

.ease-out { animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.running { animation-play-state: running; }

.paused { animation-play-state: paused; }

.fill-mode-forwards { animation-fill-mode: forwards; }

.\@container { container-type: inline-size; }

.\@container\/chat { container: chat / inline-size; }

.\@container\/code-block { container: code-block / inline-size; }

.\@container\/diffpanel { container: diffpanel / inline-size; }

.\@container\/input { container: input / inline-size; }

.\@container\/mainview { container: mainview / inline-size; }

.\@container\/nav { container: nav / inline-size; }

.\@container\/preview { container: preview / inline-size; }

.\@container\/shared-with-me { container: shared-with-me / inline-size; }

.\@container\/split-chat { container: split-chat / inline-size; }

.\@container\/team-insights { container: team-insights / inline-size; }

.\@container\/template-editor { container: template-editor / inline-size; }

.\@container\/template-list { container: template-list / inline-size; }

.\@container\/template-widget { container: template-widget / inline-size; }

.\@container\/templates-empty-state { container: templates-empty-state / in=
line-size; }

.\@container\/textarea { container: textarea / inline-size; }

.\@container\/voice-bar { container: voice-bar / inline-size; }

.no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

.no-scrollbar { scrollbar-width: none; }

@media screen and (pointer: coarse) {
  .no-touch-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-touch-scrollbar { scrollbar-width: none; }
}

.scrollbar-gutter-stable { scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges; }

.scrollbar-gutter-stable-single { scrollbar-gutter: stable; }

ar(--content-max-width)); --content-breakout-max-width: calc(var(--content-=
max-width) + 2*var(--content-gutter)); }

ar(--surface-l1)); }

ead-bg-color); }

r(--scrollbar-track); }
